Spirit of the Stag.desc: Your Rift provides damage reduction to allies standing in it.

Spirit of Starfire.desc: Grenades recharge from empowered weapon damage, with empowered weapon final blows granting more energy.

Spirit of Apotheosis.desc: Temporarily gain greatly increased melee and grenade regeneration after your Super ends.

Spirit of the Necrotic.desc: Damaging a target with a melee inflicts potent corruption. Defeating targets afflicted by corruption spreads the condition.

Spirit of Osmiomancy.desc: Your grenades recharge quicker on hits. The seeker spawned from Coldsnap grenades travels farther.

Spirit of Harmony.desc: Final blows with weapons that have a damage type matching your Super's element grant you Super energy.

Spirit of the Filaments.desc: Casting an Empowering Rift will grant you Devour. Defeating a target while Devour is active grants class ability energy.

Spirit of Competition.desc: During Guardian Games 2020, completing Crucible matches, Gambit matches, Vanguard strikes, patrols, adventures, and forges grants additional Glimmer and XP rewards.

Spirit of the Season.desc: Grants a chance to generate Dawning Spirit whenever you find a Dawning ingredient.

Spirit of the Assassin.desc: Finishers and powered melee final blows grant invisibility.

Spirit of Inmost Light.desc: Using an ability empowers the other two abilities, granting them improved energy regeneration.

Spirit of the Star-Eater.desc: While your Super energy is full, picking up an Orb of Power overcharges your Super, granting it bonus damage.

Spirit of Synthoceps.desc: Improves melee damage when you're surrounded.

Spirit of Verity.desc: Weapon final blows with a damage type matching your grenade grant a stacking grenade damage bonus and improved grenade regeneration.

Spirit of Hoarfrost.desc: Your Barricade becomes a wall of Stasis crystals that slows nearby targets when created. Activating Thruster creates Stasis crystals.

Spirit of Severance.desc: Powered melee or finisher final blows unleash a damaging explosion.

Spirit of the Abeyant.desc: Improves Drengr's Lash. Drengr's Lash projectiles track targets more aggressively and travel farther.

Spirit of the Eternal Warrior.desc: Gain bonus damage for weapons matching your Super's element when your Super ends.

Spirit of Contact.desc: Damaging a target with a powered melee causes all nearby targets to suffer lightning strikes and become jolted.

Spirit of the Bear.desc: Move faster while guarding with the Unbreakable shield. Damage blocked with Unbreakable is converted to grenade energy.

Spirit of the Horn.desc: Your class ability unleashes waves of Solar energy that damage and scorch nearby targets. Combatants damaged and Guardians defeated by these waves are enveloped in a Sunspot.

Spirit of Scars.desc: Final blows with weapons that have a damage type matching your Super's element create a burst of healing around you that grants allies restoration.

Spirit of Alpha Lupi.desc: Creates a healing pulse when your class ability is activated. Healing allies provides class ability energy.

Spirit of the Coyote.desc: Gain an additional class ability charge.

Spirit of the Wormhusk.desc: Activating your class ability grants Cure. Rapidly defeating combatants grants Burning Souls that increase the potency of healing when using Dodge and spread the healing to nearby allies.

Spirit of the Liar.desc: Dealing damage with a powered melee or being hit by a melee attack will allow you to follow up with an extremely powerful Arc melee counterpunch.

Spirit of the Gyrfalcon.desc: Your Void weapons gain volatile rounds after you emerge from being invisible.

Spirit of the Cyrtarachne.desc: Gain Woven Mail when you use your grenade.

Spirit of Renewal.desc: Allies inside the Duskfield grenade field gain Frost Armor and targets inside the field deal reduced damage.

Spirit of Caliban.desc: Powered melee final blows trigger an ignition.

Spirit of the Foetracer.desc: Damaging a powerful combatant or Guardian with an ability grants you a temporary damage bonus for weapons matching that ability's element.

Spirit of Galanor.desc: Hits and final blows with your Super will return Super energy after it ends.

Spirit of the Dragon.desc: Your weapons ready quicker and are more stable. Using your class ability temporarily increases this benefit and reloads your equipped weapon from reserves.
